title: Mustardy Crumbly Vietnamese Rice Com Tam
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Vietnamese dish featuring caramelized onions and a hint of mustard, served with crumbly rice and a side of beef stock cube infused sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat and caramelize the onions for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
In a large pot, bring 4 cups of water to a boil and add the beef stock cubes, stirring to dissolve.
Add the broken rice to the pot and stir to combine with the stock, then reduce heat to low and cover.
In a small bowl, whisk together the mustard, salt, and pepper.
Add the mustard mixture to the rice pot and stir to combine.
To serve, divide the rice mixture among individual plates, then top with caramelized onions, grated carrot, chopped scallions, and fried shallots.
Drizzle a small amount of the beef stock sauce over the top of each serving.
